title: astragalus gebleri
intro: Astragalus gebleri, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus gebleri include improving immune function, reducing fatigue and stress, and protecting against infections and diseases. Astragalus gebleri can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
